summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: Test suite does NOT test GitHub Actions workflow execution via act, which is an explicit primary requirement ('ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT'). The bats tests ignore workflow structure validation, fixture-based act testing, and act-result.txt artifact generation entirely. Weak assertions use substring matching instead of exact output verification. Priority ordering test doesn't verify semantics (just checks both labels exist, not which wins). Deduplication test is inadequate (counts >= 1 instead of == 1). test-with-act.sh is separate, incomplete, and not integrated. Missing edge cases: special characters, malformed YAML, permission errors, complex glob patterns. The test suite would fail to catch regressions in workflow behavior, fixture handling, and CI/CD integration—the core of the requirements.
